summary: High‑quality fan bootleg capture; reviewers praise the clear audio even though performance details are lacking.
review: The lone five‑star review calls this a great FOB (fan‑operated bootleg) recording and notes that the sound is pleasant and well captured. No specific comments about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members are provided, so listeners can expect a clean audience‑sourced tape but must evaluate the show themselves.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (5 stars) focusing on recording quality; no musical detail to assess, so rating leans high due to praised audio but confidence is low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the FOB capture as 'great' and 'really nice', indicating clear and pleasant sound for an audience recording with no noted issues.
